title: Products
noDescription: Seller did not add a description
safetyTips: Shop with confidence - Buyer protection included
notFound: This listing has ended or is no longer available
conditionDescNew: A brand-new, unused item in its original packaging. The packaging should be unopened and undamaged.
conditionDescUsed: An item that has been used previously. The item may have some signs of cosmetic wear, but is fully operational and functions as intended. This item may be a floor model or store return that has been used. See the seller's listing for full details and description of any imperfections.
watchlistCount: [COUNT] have added this to their watchlist
contactSellerHint: For more information about this item, feel free to contact the seller

fields.title: Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your item: condition, usage, etc.
fields.imagesHint: Upload up to 9 images, first one is cover

validation.imagesRequired: At least one image is required

installment.paymentProvider: Supports credit cards, wallets, and more.
installment.popupSubdesc: Pay for your purchase over 3 to 24 months with rates from 0.00-35.99%. No fees if you pay on time.
installment.step1: Select the items you want to buy
installment.step2: Choose credit card installment as your payment method
installment.step3: Confirm your installment plan and complete payment
installment.step4: All set! Track your installment payments in your account
installment.disclaimer: Down payment may be required. Installment plans are subject to credit card issuer approval. Monthly payments and interest rates vary by bank and plan selected. See terms and conditions.

delivery.handlingTimeValue: Usually ships within 1 business day after payment clears.
delivery.returnShippingInfo: Buyer pays return shipping. If you use TURNSY shipping label, that amount will be deducted from your refund.
delivery.returnPolicyInfo: For more details, please refer to TURNSY return policy. If item received doesn't match description, you're protected by TURNSY Money Back Guarantee.

delivery.klarnaInfo: Pay for your purchase in installments with your credit card. Choose from 3, 6, 12, or 24 monthly payment plans. Flexible payment options with no extra fees if you pay on time.
